title: ageratina queretaroana
intro: Ageratina queretaroana, also known as Queretaro Hilltop Plant or Hierba Santa, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ageratina queretaroana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antispasmodic, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Ageratina queretaroana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or used topically for their medicinal benefits.
